description: Fragment from a letter with a lengthy Hebrew introduction. Little of the original substance of the message is preserved. Mentions a 'khidma' (service) and מלאכת המלך ('work of/for the king'). (Information in part from CUDL.) Probably the same sender and addressee as T-S 10J10.16 (PGPID 2775).
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
